title: 10inch Stone Carving Hammer Hardened Steel Mallet for Masonry
description:
A heavy mallet like this is ideal for breaking up and carving granite, sandstone, tile, and more. You'll also find it useful in small home renovation projects. The wood handle makes for heavier blows in environments where there is limited swing room. This heavy duty mallet can be used to strike cold chisels, star drills, spikes, hardened nails and punches. It is a very reliable and effective tool that you can count on to get the job done right. 1 1/8 Inch Striking Surface Forged Steel Head Solid Wood Handle Weight: 18.4 ounces or 1.15lbs

10inch Stone Carving Hammer Hardened Steel Mallet for Masonry

A heavy mallet like this is ideal for breaking up and carving granite, sandstone, tile, and more. You'll also find it useful in small home renovation projects. The wood handle makes for heavier blows in environments where there is limited swing room.

Key Features

  • Hardened Steel Hammer Head
  • 10" Wood Handle
  • Perfect for Stone Masonry
  • Weight: 1.15lbs or 18.4oz
  • Dimensions: 10 x 4 x 4 inches (LWH)

Product Specifications

  • MPN: MASHAMM-443
  • UPC: 985623256785
  • Color: Black
